policy: Scaling is stepwise, evidence-gated, never emotional. All gates AND with no halt flags.

global_requirements_all_gates.notes: If slippage_coverage_label is missing_or_thin, scaling is blocked regardless of numeric averages.

gates.description: Raise per-trade or aggregate open notional one step.
gates.step_rule: One step only (e.g. +25% notional cap), then hold at least 10 trading days.

gates.description: Allow more round-trips per UTC day.
gates.step_rule: +1 trade/day max per promotion; 15+ clean trading days since last frequency change.

gates.description: Add one new symbol/product class to live allowlist.
gates.step_rule: One product at a time; shadow parity proof required.

gates.description: Reduce minimum seconds between decisions or re-entries.
gates.step_rule: Max -10% cooldown per step; never below hard venue safety floor.

gates.description: Expand scanner breadth, candidate fan-out, or correlation budget.
gates.step_rule: One dimension at a time (breadth OR depth), with rollback preset documented.

gates.description: Loosen non-safety deployment parameters (still within hard caps).
gates.step_rule: Requires explicit human+CEO artifact linkage; never same-day as other gate changes.
